message:
fix: address bugs in new TUI features

- Add nil check for dependencies in copyIssueToClipboard
- Fix openInEditor to detect terminal editors (vim/nano) and suggest
  GUI editor instead - terminal editors don't work with TUI
- Fix error message to not reference non-existent CLI flag
- Move focusTimeTravelInput handling before global keys to prevent
  letters like 'q' from triggering quit instead of typing
- Remove duplicate focus case that's now unreachable
- Improve editor detection with platform-specific GUI fallbacks

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
